name: pi-recap
description_en: Session recap panel for pi coding agent. Always-visible widget showing the current goal and last few conversation turns with live streaming updates. Auto-selects the fastest, cheapest summarization model using pi-bench benchmark data.
description_zh: pi 编码代理的会话摘要面板。始终可见的小部件，显示当前目标和最后几个对话回合，具有实时流更新。使用 pi-bench 基准数据自动选择最快、最便宜的摘要模型
